name: Why Women Love
overview: Zhao Jiangyue, the no-nonsense head of a tech firm, is a master at business but clueless in matters of the heart. When Gu Jiaxin, heir to a business group and a successful racing driver, is assigned as her temporary assistant, they clash.

trailers.title: MULTISUB【不会恋爱的我们 Why Women Love】预告：恋爱进阶，霸气御姐遇上小狼狗！| 金晨/王子异/王双/梁大维/彭雅琦/郑妙/何泽远/王峥 | 都市爱情片 | 优酷 YOUKU
